CREATE DICTIONARY hierarchy_flat_dictionary (number UInt64, parent UInt64) PRIMARY KEY number SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(HOST 'localhost' PORT 9000 USER 'default' PASSWORD '' DB 'test')) LIFETIME(300) LAYOUT(FLAT());
WITH (SELECT MAX(number) FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary) AS max_value SELECT dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', max_value);
SELECT dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', key) FROM (SELECT number AS key FROM system.numbers LIMIT 5);
SELECT d.number, dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', d.number) AS children FROM (SELECT DISTINCT number FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary) AS d;
CREATE TABLE sample_table (id UInt64, dict_key UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT st.id, dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', st.dict_key) FROM sample_table AS st WHERE st.dict_key IN (SELECT number FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary WHERE parent = 1);
SELECT dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', ((SELECT number FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary WHERE parent = 1 LIMIT 1)));
WITH (SELECT number FROM hierarchy_flat_dictionary WHERE parent = 0 LIMIT 1) AS root_key SELECT dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', root_key);
SELECT dictGetChildren('hierarchy_flat_dictionary', (SELECT number FROM sample_table WHERE id = 1));
